title: fabric-archive SKILL.md — Add Phase -0.5 Range Resolution (time-window + topic-keyword)
description: Insert a new Phase -0.5 BEFORE Phase 0 that parses the skill invocation prompt for explicit range hints (time window OR topic keyword OR session_id reference) and resolves them to a concrete session_id[] set. This is the foundation of the E4 (user-language range selection) entry point. Parsing rules: zh-CN time words (`今日`/`上周`/`过去 N 天`/`自上次归档`), en time words (`today`/`last week`/`past N days`/`since last archive`), topic keywords matched against session-digest user_messages content. On parse miss → AskUserQuestion fallback. Falls through to Phase 0 unchanged if no range hint detected.

files.target: insert new H3 section between '## 执行流程 (5 Phase / 1 User Review Round)' header and existing '### Phase 0.6 — Config Load'
files.change: Add complete Phase -0.5 section with: (1) invocation context detection (prompt natural-language analysis); (2) time-window parsing table (zh-CN + en patterns); (3) topic-keyword extraction (free-form word matching against session digests); (4) session_id resolution algorithm (filter events.jsonl by time-window AND/OR digest keyword match); (5) fallback AskUserQuestion shape per UX i18n Policy class 5 with options=['today','last-week','since-last-archive','custom']; (6) carry-forward contract — Phase -0.5 produces session_id[] passed to Phase 0.0 as input filter; absent range hint → all-distinct-session behavior (current default).

implementation: Read current SKILL.md L33-L48 (Phase 0.6 Config Load) to confirm insertion point.

Write Phase -0.5 section with these subsections:
  - Step 1: Invocation context inspection (read user prompt text + hook-context-marker if E1)
  - Step 2: Time-window parsing (table of zh/en patterns → ts_start/ts_end)
  - Step 3: Topic-keyword extraction (split prompt into 2-5 word tokens, filter common stop-words, retain content words)
  - Step 4: session_id resolution algorithm:
    a. Read events.jsonl tail (last 500 events)
    b. For each distinct session_id: gather its [ts_min, ts_max] + digest content
    c. Filter by time-window: keep session_id if [ts_min, ts_max] intersects parsed window
    d. Filter by topic-keyword: keep session_id if digest content matches ≥1 keyword (case-insensitive substring)
    e. AND semantics: session must pass BOTH filters if both present; OR semantics within each filter category
  - Step 5: Fallback flow when no range hints AND user_invocation_type ∈ {E2, E4} (not E1/E3/E5):
    a. AskUserQuestion with options ['today','last-week','since-last-archive','custom']
    b. 'custom' → loops back into Phase -0.5 with user-typed sub-prompt
  - Step 6: Pass session_id[] (or 'all' sentinel when no range) to Phase 0.0
Add UX i18n Policy class 5 example for the AskUserQuestion (zh-CN header '归档范围' + en header 'Archive range', options stays English).
Add 3 worked examples: '今日复盘' (time-only), 'rc.20 的归档下' (keyword-only), '上周 rc.20' (combined).
Update Phase numbering: existing Phase 0.6 / 0.0 / 0.4 / 0 / 0.5 retain their numbers; new -0.5 prefixes the chain.

reference.pattern: Phase 0.6 Config Load (existing, L33-L48) — same H3 + table + bullet structure
reference.examples: Phase 0.0 Cross-Session Digest collection (L124-L161) is the structural precedent for cross-session reasoning within the skill.

rationale.chosen_approach: Pure SKILL.md prose change. AI (Claude/Codex) interprets the Phase -0.5 instructions at runtime — no parser code needed since LLM is the parser. Time-window patterns + keyword extraction are LLM-native tasks.
alternatives_considered: CLI flag (--since=7d) — rejected per cli-design principle 'can interact, don't make a flag'
Server-side parser endpoint — rejected: AI in skill context has full LLM capability, server-side parser duplicates work
Skip Phase -0.5, force user to always rely on Phase 0.0 defaults — rejected: E4 entry point would have no implementation
decision_factors: LLM-native parsing is more flexible than regex
AskUserQuestion fallback is acceptable since E2/E4 are user-active entries
Phase -0.5 is additive — Phase 0.0 onwards unaffected when no range hint
rationale.tradeoffs: AI must correctly interpret natural-language time references; mitigation: AskUserQuestion fallback when parse confidence is low.

manual_checks: Dogfood: invoke '/fabric-archive 上周的归档下' in a fresh session, verify Phase -0.5 filters session_ids correctly
Dogfood: invoke '/fabric-archive' without range, verify falls through to current Phase 0.0 behavior
success_metrics: SKILL.md adds new '### Phase -0.5 — Range Resolution' H3 section
AskUserQuestion fallback example renders correctly per UX i18n Policy class 5
integration: Manual dogfood with 3 prompt patterns (time-only / keyword-only / combined / no-range)

criteria: SKILL.md contains exact string '### Phase -0.5 — Range Resolution'
SKILL.md contains zh-CN time pattern table with at least 4 entries (今日 / 上周 / 过去 N 天 / 自上次归档)
SKILL.md contains en time pattern table with at least 4 entries (today / last week / past N days / since last archive)
SKILL.md contains 3 worked examples (time-only, keyword-only, combined)
SKILL.md contains AskUserQuestion fallback example with options=['today','last-week','since-last-archive','custom']
